zh.lifeSummary: Henry Fitz Aucher是Richard Fitz Aucher和Mrs Richard Fitz Aucher的兒子，於1255年出生在英國英格蘭艾可希 拉沃。他於1270年2月14日之前與Ela De Ely結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1303年11月5日在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾卡索普享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Aucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch or German   Acker  . Compare   Auker  .

variants.name: Acker
meanings: Dutch and German: topographic name from Middle High German and Middle Dutch acker ‘(cultivated) field’ (a cognate of the English word acre), hence a byname for a peasant (see Ackerman ). Compare Achor , Acre , Acree , and Auker .

English: habitational name from Castle Acre, South Acre, or West Acre in Norfolk; or a topographic name for someone living by a piece of cultivated land, from Middle English aker, acre ‘acre, field’ (Old English æcer). Compare Akers .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Acker ‘field’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Fitz Aucher was born in 1255, in High Laver, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard Fitz Aucher and Mrs Richard Fitz Aucher. He married Ela De Ely before 14 February 1270. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 5 November 1303, in Carthorpe, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Fitz Aucher est né en 1255, à High Laver, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard Fitz Aucher et Mrs Richard Fitz Aucher. Il a épousé Ela De Ely avant 14 février 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1303, à Carthorpe, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Fitz Aucher è nato il nel 1255 nel High Laver, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richard Fitz Aucher e Mrs Richard Fitz Aucher. Lui sposato Ela De Ely prima del 14 febbraio 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 5 novembre 1303, nel Carthorpe, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Fitz Aucherは1255年にイギリスイギリスエセックスヒグ ラバーでRichard Fitz AucherとMrs Richard Fitz Aucherの息子として生まれた。1270年2月14日以前にEla De Elyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1303年11月5日にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアカーソルペで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Fitz Aucher(은)는 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 히그h 레이버에서 Richard Fitz Aucher(와)과 Mrs Richard Fitz Aucher의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1270년 2월 14일 이전 Ela De Ely(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1303년 11월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 카소에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Fitz Aucher nasceu em 1255, em High Laver, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richard Fitz Aucher e Mrs Richard Fitz Aucher. Ele casou-se com Ela De Ely antes 14 de fevereiro de 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1303, em Carthorpe, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Fitz Aucher родился в 1255 г. в местности хаи лавир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Richard Fitz Aucher и Mrs Richard Fitz Aucher. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela De Ely перед 14 февраль 1270 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 5 ноября 1303 г. в местности картаурп, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
